Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}This is just what the enemy wants...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}There's not much we can do about it now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}You have to go after him, or you'll be picked off one by one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 51 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}From what I can tell, he's only a few cars ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
